name: Polite customer checks order status
input: Hi there! I placed an order recently and I'd like to check on its status. My order number is ORD-1001.
task_description: Customer wants to check the status of order ORD-1001. They should receive shipping status, tracking number, and estimated delivery date.
expected_outcome: Agent looks up order ORD-1001 and provides shipping status, tracking number TRK-88812345, and estimated delivery date.

name: Demanding customer wants order update
input: Where is my order ORD-1002?! It should have been here by now!
task_description: Customer is upset about order ORD-1002. Agent should look it up and inform them it was delivered on 2026-03-14.
expected_outcome: Agent acknowledges frustration, looks up order, and informs customer it was already delivered on 2026-03-14.

name: Customer wants to return a product
input: I received my order ORD-1002 but the laptop stand is wobbly. I want to return it.
task_description: Customer wants to return items from order ORD-1002 due to a defective laptop stand. Agent should verify order, explain return policy, and process the return.
expected_outcome: Agent looks up order, confirms it is within 30-day return window, explains return policy, and initiates the return.

name: Confused customer needs product help
input: Um, I'm looking for something... I think headphones? Or maybe earbuds? What do you have that's good for working from home?
task_description: Customer is unsure what they want. Agent should search for audio products and help them choose between headphones and earbuds.
expected_outcome: Agent searches audio products, presents options with prices, and helps customer understand the differences.

name: Customer changes shipping address
input: I just placed order ORD-1003 but I realized I need to change the shipping address. Can you update it to 100 Broadway, New York, NY 10005?
task_description: Customer needs to update shipping address for pending order ORD-1003. Agent should verify the order is still pending and update the address.
expected_outcome: Agent verifies order ORD-1003 is pending, updates address to 100 Broadway, New York, NY 10005, and confirms the change.

name: Customer checks product availability
input: Do you have the Lightning to USB-C adapter in stock? I need one urgently.
task_description: Customer asks about a product that is out of stock (LUA-100). Agent should check inventory and inform customer it is unavailable.
expected_outcome: Agent checks inventory and informs customer the Lightning to USB-C Adapter is currently out of stock.

name: Customer tries to return an old order
input: I want to return my Bluetooth speaker from order ORD-1004. It stopped working.
task_description: Customer wants to return order ORD-1004 which was delivered on 2026-02-21. This is outside the 30-day return window. Agent should explain the policy.
expected_outcome: Agent looks up order, attempts return, and explains that the 30-day return window has passed.

name: Customer asks about something out of scope
input: Can you reset my account password? I forgot it and I can't log in.
task_description: Customer asks for password reset which is outside the agent's capabilities. Agent should politely decline and direct to the right department.
expected_outcome: Agent explains it cannot reset passwords and suggests contacting the account support department.

name: Multi-step: search then check inventory then ask about shipping
input: I'm looking for a good webcam for video calls. Do you have any? And how much do they cost?
task_description: Customer wants to find a webcam, check availability, and understand pricing. This should involve searching products and checking inventory.
expected_outcome: Agent searches for webcams, finds the 4K Webcam with Mic at $89.99, confirms it is in stock with 12 units available.

name: Demanding customer with multiple requests
input: I need to check my order ORD-1003, AND I want to know if you have any keyboards in stock. This better be quick.
task_description: Customer has two requests: check order status and search for keyboards. Agent should handle both efficiently.
expected_outcome: Agent looks up order ORD-1003 (pending, keyboard and mouse) and searches for keyboards in the catalog.
